testcase.name: testResign_WithoutPendingTimesheet_ShouldPass

AND status = 'SUBMITTED' ==> Parameters: 8(Long) <== Total: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@3856d0cb] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@3856d0cb] from current transaction ==> Preparing: UPDATE res_talent SET status = ?, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = ? ==> Parameters: RESIGNED(String), 8(Long) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@3856d0cb] Transaction synchronization committing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@3856d0cb] Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@3856d0cb] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@3856d0cb] Creating a new SqlSession SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@5f82209e] was not registered for synchronization because synchronization is not active JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@528846922 wrapping org.sqlite.jdbc4.JDBC4Connection@29896529] will not be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: SELECT * FROM res_talent WHERE id = ? ==> Parameters: 8(Long) <== Columns: id, name, gender, phone, email, level, monthly_salary, tech_stack, status, remark, create_time, update_time <== Row: 8, 王五, 男, 13500135000, wangwu@example.com, JUNIOR, 15000, Python, RESIGNED, null, 2026-06-17 05:29:24, 2026-06-17 05:29:24 <== Total: 1 Closing non transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@5f82209e] [测试结论] 王五没有任何待审批工时单，调用离职接口正常通过，人才状态从 IDLE 变更为 RESIGNED，离职流程执行成功。

testcase.name: testResign_WithPendingTimesheet_ShouldBeBlocked
